com.nib.supernaut.exceptions.TerminalException

Packages that use TerminalException
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.printer
virtual printer terminal services

    Acquires a terminal based on the provided terminal ID or connection request.

    Attaches to an existing terminal session using the provided session token.

    void
    SupernautRegion.disconnect(SessionToken token)
    Disconnects a session using the provided session token.
    void
    SupernautRegion.updateSession(TerminalSession s)
    Updates the given terminal session.
